response: **FOUNDATION OF FAITH**-THE PASTOR MUST ESTABLISH A VISION ROOTED IN SCRIPTURE-THIS VISION UNITES DIVERSE INDIVIDUALS UNDER ONE SPIRITUAL GOAL-**COMMUNITY ENGAGEMENT**-ACTIVE LISTENING AND EMPATHY CREATE TRUST AMONG CONGREGANTS-REGULAR GATHERINGS FOSTER DEEPER RELATIONSHIPS AND SHARED PURPOSE-**SUSTAINABLE GROWTH**-MENTORING NEW MEMBERS ENSURES LONG TERM STABILITY-CONTINUOUS PRAYER AND REFLECTION KEEP THE COMMUNITY SPIRITUALLY VITAL
